summary: PGlite constructor with no error handling can crash the sidecar process
details: new PGlite(dataDir) at db.pg.ts:31 has no try/catch block. If the PGlite WASM module fails to initialize (corrupt data directory, missing WASM binary, OOM), the exception propagates unhandled and crashes the sidecar process, which cascades to crash the entire desktop app. This is the highest-priority fix for safe mode: wrap in try/catch and report status to a health registry.
